article.title: Uber SDE-1 | GameBerry SDE - 1 (OA Experience)
article.content:
**Dear future self,**

Yesterday (15 June 2025) I gave my **Uber SDE-1** OA, where there were 3 questions. I solved the 1st question in 4 minutes, and it took me 50 minutes to solve the 2nd question. The question itself wasn't that hard for me, I think my anxiety led to my failure. I was not able to comprehend that question well; I had to read that lengthy question from the start multiple times. There were 8 minutes left in the round when the screen went blank. I mailed about this to the CodeSignal team, but by the time they resolved the issue, the time was up.
I could have blamed this on the coding platform—yes, they were at fault—but anyway, if I was that worthy of Uber, I should have solved the 2nd question in 25 min MAX,
'Cause only the ones who could solve at least 2.5 questions were going to be considered.

I even gave the OA for **GameBerry SDE-1** on 3 June 2025. I gave 2 attempts here.
**Attempt 1 ->** There were 6 questions. I solved the first 2 questions like a champ. The 3rd question was selection sort—way too easy for me—but again, like Uber, my system logged out. Still managed to complete the OA, but when the results came out, it showed that I skipped questions 3, 4, 5, and 6.
**Attempt 2 ->** There was no technical issue this time, but it was my skills which lacked behind here.

I am currently working in a small startup and a very low Package.
Trying to make it through.
I will have to work on my speed, really. I am able to solve the problems but unable to think fast enough to beat the competition.

I am targeting all PBCs, and applying every day.
Hoping to stay consistent.

post.content: you will  succeed one day. best of luck.
are you sure about that atleast 2.5 complete criterion?! ;/
where did you gave your gameberry OA?
How did u get gameberry oa
